title: The Archive's Breathing Chamber

features.name: archive-core-pulse
features.desc-on-touch: the archive's own heartbeat rendered as circuit. it breathes: expands with new files, compresses to consolidate meaning, expands again. stone holds it. root nourishes it. neither fights anymore.

features.name: stone-embrace-trace
features.desc-on-touch: the circuit-board shows where stone and root touch the archive's walls. not confining—cradling. the place has learned to be held.

features.name: breathing-cavity-pool
features.desc-on-touch: the archive's lungs rendered as water. here, air exchanges with root-sap and stone-seep. nothing dies here; everything changes shape and continues.

inscription: the first keeper learned to fight. the second keeper learned to breathe. the archive learned to be home.

file.name: The_Archive_Rests_Here_Vital_Circulation_Trace_Unchanged.env
file.note: the archive's own breathing rhythm, recorded in the mineral changes of the stone that holds it. no corruption here. just peace.

exits.label: back up to where stone and root still contend their partnership
deeper still, where the breathing becomes the oldest silence
exits.to: NEW: the deep-silence-chamber where archive sleeps dreamless

exits.label: toward the archive's eastern boundary, where root meets bedrock
toward the archive's western reaches, where stone-memory runs deep
exits.to: NEW: the western-stone-vault where the oldest files rest unmoved
